curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Only one non-test source file changed (mlflow/utils/uri.py). The patch adds urllib.parse.unquote() to decode URL-encoded paths before validation in validate_path_is_safe(). Location derived directly from the patch diff. The advisory description and CWE IDs (CWE-22, CWE-29) confirm path-traversal classification. L3 hints now differentiated from L1/L2 — L3 area narrows to URI/path validation utilities, L3 description adds detail about percent-encoded dot-dot-slash patterns and the specific API endpoints involved. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
